'''Tancon''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="MilkRun" /> located in the [[Tancon system/Legends|Tancon system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Koradin sector/Legends|Koradin sector]].<ref name="EAOC Tancon" /> It was situated at a distance of two [[Standard day/Legends|days']] travel with a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] equipped with a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] from the [[Soarin system]]<ref name="MilkRun" /> of the [[Wazta sector/Legends|Wazta sector]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> At some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Dates">"[[Milk Run]]" is set between the events of {{Film|IV}} and {{Film|V}}, which corresponds to the [[Time/Legends|time]] period between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] maintained on Tancon a base with a briefing room in it.<ref name="MilkRun" />

The base's [[Unidentified Rebel Alliance commander (Tancon)|commander]] at one point briefed a Rebel team that was due for a rest-and-recuperation period on a [[Mission to Karinda|mission]] to deliver supplies from the Soarin [[Star system/Legends|system]]'s [[Greyman's Planet]] to the Alliance's [[Karinda Outpost]] on the [[Karinda system/Legends|Karinda system]] planet of the [[Karinda|same name]]. The team then departed for Greyman's Planet aboard the base's [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] ''[[Arion Star]]''.<ref name="MilkRun" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tancon appeared in the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' adventure "[[Milk Run]]," which was written by [[Sterling Hershey]]<ref name="MilkRun" /> and was run by the [[RPGA]] Network at the [[1991]] [[Wikipedia:Gen Con|Gen Con]] gaming convention.<ref name="GenCon">{{WebCite|url=https://www.sterlinghershey.com/freelance|text=freelance — STERLING HERSHEY|archivedate=20240122010627}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Tancon system, and therefore the planet itself, in grid square J-18.<ref name="TEA Tancon" />
